fielddocs.body: {"ok":true,"checklist":{"id":"checklist_65e9cfe9-1c06-4e98-8109-8b1229f35f11","tenantId":"aquatrace","templateId":"leak_detection_checklist_v1","jobId":"route_probe_job","title":"Leak Detection Checklist","items":[{"id":"item_1","label":"Confirm static water loss baseline","required":true,"status":"pending"},{"id":"item_2","label":"Inspect skimmers and throats","required":true,"status":"pending"},{"id":"item_3","label":"Inspect returns and fittings","required":true,"status":"pending"},{"id":"item_4","label":"Dye-test suspect penetrations","required":true,"status":"pending"},{"id":"item_5","label":"Inspect equipment pad and visible plumbing","required":true,"status":"pending"},{"id":"item_6","label":"Capture before and after photos","required":true,"status":"pending"},{"id":"item_7","label":"Record findings and repair recommendation","required":true,"status":"pending"}],"createdAt":"2026-07-05T01:29:21.754Z"}}
